body.title: Master skills home in agent_datacenter — deploy to ~/.claude/skills/ on each machine
body.result: Installer mechanism shipped (akienm/agent_datacenter@4332f8d). devices/installer/{shim,backends,manifest}.py + skills/manifest.json + agentctl skills deploy/status CLI subcommands. RsyncBackend (Linux/Mac, --checksum so master wins on content), WindowsBackend stub. Manifest with 25 machine-agnostic skills triaged for migration; map-igor + readigor stay TheIgors-internal. 10 regression tests pass (idempotent, preserves-user-added, per-host filter, missing-source-no-crash, disabled-skip, stale-overwrite, status-shape, Windows-raises, posix-picks-rsync, manifest-version). 229 agent_datacenter tests still pass. Companion T-skills-content-migrate-to-master filed for actual content move.
body.description:
Per Akien 2026-05-01: ClaudeAndAkienWorkshop is obsolete; everything that was workshop-bound is now agent_datacenter material. Skills should NOT live in TheIgors/ anymore. Design + ship: master skills set in agent_datacenter (kept current there), deployed to ~/.claude/skills/ on each machine.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/skills/ (NEW master home), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/devices/installer/shim.py (deploy hook), ~/.claude/skills/ (deploy target), TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/ (some skills migrate; some stay TheIgors-internal — needs per-skill audit)
**Design rules:** master-deployable-source-of-truth, ship-clean (no aliasing shims)
**Scope boundary:** in — directory layout in agent_datacenter for skills, deploy mechanism (rsync? symlink? skill-by-skill copy via installer?), per-skill triage (machine-agnostic vs Igor-specific); out — actually moving cc_skills/* (handled in companion ticket once design is agreed)
**Test plan:** test_skill_deploy_idempotent (deploy twice → same result), test_skill_deploy_preserves_local_skills (don't delete user-added ones), spike-deploy on second machine to verify
